title: Shikigami Event Payload v1.0
description: Event posted to POST /v1/events on the Shikigami local HTTP server. Consumed by the Hierarchical Fusion state machine (events → dominant state; event.text → texture modifier).

schemaVersion.description: Exact schema version. v0.1 of the app only accepts 1.0.

source.description: Originating AI tool. v0.1 accepts only 'claude-code'; others are reserved.

type.description: Canonical event type that the state machine maps to a dominant state.

tool.description: Name of the tool being invoked (e.g., 'Bash', 'Edit', 'Read'). Relevant for tool_start / tool_complete.

exitCode.description: Process exit code for tool_complete events. 0 indicates success; non-zero maps to warning state.

durationMs.description: How long the tool ran, in milliseconds. Informational; not used for state mapping in v0.1.

severity.description: Severity tag. Scales state duration and suppresses texture modifier when 'critical'.

text.description: Optional free text associated with the event (e.g., commit message, error output, assistant response). Used for texture extraction via regex. Truncated at 8KB at ingest.

metadata.description: Arbitrary additional key-value pairs. Not used for state mapping; may be displayed in debug overlay.
